headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Yum Brands, Raises Price Target to $165
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Zachary Fadem   maintains Yum Brands (NYSE:YUM) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $160 to $165.

headline: Yum! Brands Q1 2026 profit jumps 71% to $432m
summary: Digital sales neared $11bn for the quarter, making up a record 63% of total system sales.

headline: Yum Brands takes flight in Q1 as KFC fuels global ascent
summary: Yum Brands gained altitude in Q1 2026, reporting 6% system sales growth, 5% unit expansion and 3% same-store sales growth during its April 29 earnings call.KFC provided much of the lift through rapid...
